title: Function
text: Function Function to include in the panel. A function can be a user-defined operation or a structure editor function, or it can represent a new line or a separator. Value Description Separator Inserts a space into the pane, which can separate groups of related panel functions. New_Line Creates a new line in the panel, enabling panels to contain multiple lines of buttons. All subsequent functions appear on the new line. Activate_operation Operation in the current form. If the form does not contain the named operation, the button is disabled. StructureEditorFunction Uniface structure editor function. Each function can only be used once in a panel. Description Each panel button represents a function or operation that is activated when the user clicks it. For structure editor functions, the glyph and text associated with the function are automatically displayed. For operations, you must explicitly specify the glyph and message text to be associated with the button. Applies To Panels Related Links Message Text Text of message to be used in place of the glyph or as a tooltip. This property is read-only, displaying a message that has the same name as the selected glyph. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
